title: ononis antiquorum var. confusa
intro: Ononis antiquorum var. confusa, also known as the Burmed Kidney or Salsify-leaved Ononis, is a plant species in the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The plant has been used to treat a range of health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating urinary tract infections. Ononis antiquorum var. confusa can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction to utilize its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
